emails.body:
Microsoft Teams Security Alert

Dear LCDR Maddox,

Our security systems detected an unusual sign-in attempt on your Microsoft Teams account from an unrecognized device/location.

Sign-in details:
• Time: 2026-10-02 10:45 AM EDT
• Location: Unverified IP range
• Device: Unknown mobile device

If this was you, no further action is needed. If you do not recognize this activity, please secure your account immediately by verifying your identity:

[Verify My Account]

This link will expire in 4 hours for your protection.

For assistance, contact the IT Service Desk at ext. 4-HELP.

— Account Security Team
Microsoft Identity Protection

---
This is an automated message. Please do not reply directly to this email.
